title: The Bible Unearthed: Archaeology's New Vision of Ancient Israel and the Origin of Its Sacred Texts
author: Israel Finkelstein; Neil Asher Silberman
allowedUseNotes: Copyrighted trade monograph. Summaries in project's own words only.
summary: Influential statement of the low-chronology / minimalist-leaning reading: David as a modest highland chieftain, with state formation later than the conventional picture. Used to represent one pole of the early-monarchy debate.
confidenceNotes: Represents one scholarly pole; must always be paired with alternative views (e.g., Mazar) in the UI.
